# illustrations-blush

**Count:** 66 PNG files (target: 60+ — meets)
**Source:** Blush Design — https://blush.design (free collection previews)
**Acquired:** scraped preview PNG renders from the free Blush collection showcase URLs. SVG export is gated behind account/paywall; preview PNGs are publicly served.

## Format note

PNG only. Spec permitted SVG OR PNG. Blush free collection previews are PNG renders; SVG / vector export requires a Blush account and is not publicly accessible without one.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

## Notes

Blush assets have a distinct chunky-gouache style; use sparingly, not mixed in-line with Humaaans or unDraw in the same surface.
